item.title: ‘Kinetic’ Metroidvania game Feather’s Edge announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Dash and slash through a handcrafted world.

Clockwork Acorn has announced Feather’s Edge, a “kinetic” Metroidvania game starring a bird warrior. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Dash and slash through an innovative kinetic Metroidvania. The Tower of Time awaits—a rich, handcrafted world fractured by the collapse of time. Slice through foes in tough-as-talons bite-sized battles, and master the way of the bird warrior.

Play as Upu, the Hoopoe bird warrior, and chart your own course to the top of the Tower before it collapses completely, and the world along with it.

Dash into Kinetic Excitement

Fast-paced battles demand quick-thinking and the ability to adapt. Ultimate victory can only be earned through precision, diligence and a keen wit.

You will pick up the basics easy enough, but can you refine your skills and master the way of the bird warrior?

Achieve Tactical Mastery

Every battle is a playground. Every cut is an opportunity for perfection. Every ability has its time and place. Simply surviving each challenge will not be enough to traverse the Tower of Time. Reaching its shattered peak will require you to demonstrate true mastery.

Traverse the Tower of Time

The Tower of Time is ancient and eternal, but what happens when time itself collapses? For as long as anyone can remember, its shattered summit has floated serenely in the sky. Until now…

The cracks have been growing. Entire sections are drifting apart. With each passing moment, the strain on the world grows.

Journey through the Tower and discover a strange world shaped by the irregular flow of time within. Cut your own path through a world filled with eons-old jungles, ancient lava flows, freezing winds, and rifts in the fabric of time. To have any hope of restoring balance, you’ll have to master the secrets hidden within.

Restore the Flow of Time

Enter the time rifts plaguing the Tower. Face bite-sized battles, beatable in seconds. Revisit them to hone your skills, grow your knowledge, and earn progress through the tower. Master the rifts to repair the true flow of time.

Watch the announcement trailer below. Visit the official website here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/kinetic-metroidvania-game-feathers-edge-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Two Point Museum DLC ‘Arty-Facts’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Publisher SEGA and developer Two Point Studios have announced Two Point Museum downloadable content “Arty-Facts.” It will launch on May 7 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC, followed by Switch 2 at a later date.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via SEGA:

“Arty-Facts” invites museum managers to express themselves by collecting and commissioning art exhibitions and installations in Two Point County. Curators can dress their galleries with Famous Works from Two Point’s greats, from “Two Point Gothic” (American Gothic starring Gubbins), to “The Persistence of Dairy” (Dali’s Persistence of Memory with pizzas replacing clocks) and “Box of Truffle Pigs” (Andy Warhol’s iconic Monroe work re-imagined with boars).

It’s not just static works of art on display either, as creative curator, you’ll immerse guests in interactive experiences ranging from Performance Arts to displays like the Sketch Show, a lively, monochrome display evoking memories of a famous eighties music video!

If you’re feeling particularly creative, you’ll task experts to create Original Art in the new Studio Room. These works are comprised of multiple layers, and budding artists can customize their pieces by carefully selecting a medium, and expert, who has just the right traits. Original Art will have guests feeling their feels, as your experts learn to invoke new emotions through explorative learning through Zara Fitzpocket’s famous sketch book, which appears as a new Expedition Map.

There’s a huge number of combinations to discover, from majestic sculptures to humble stick drawings, but beware, with great paint comes great responsibility… and there may be a few spills.

The downloadable content includes:

  • A brand-new museum location: Undee Docks
  • New expert type: Art Experts
  • An unexplored expedition map through Zara’s Sketchbook
  • Over 27 Art Exhibits including Famous Works
  • New Gift Shop items
  • New themed Cafe items
  • Five new Interactive Art displays
  • New themed items and decorations
  • New Art Studio room to create original art pieces
  • For eager artists, Two Point Studios will be offering a free DLC taster on 30 April, where players can play up to the first star of Arty-Facts at the new Undee Docks locations

Two Point Museum is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC “Arty-Facts” Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯
